title: A polite request
question: 把今天课文里“清楚但礼貌的提醒”放进学校、图书馆或共享单车的小场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: Welcome to our library. This is a quiet area. You will enjoy your reading if you pay attention to the signs. This note is only a reminder.
word_bank: This note is only a reminder
You will enjoy your stay here

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 走廊提醒：不要用严厉命令吓人，而是礼貌提醒同学慢慢走
options.english_template: In the hallway, a polite sign can say: ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 图书馆提醒：欢迎对方，再告诉对方注意标志、保持安静
options.english_template: ___. You will enjoy your reading if you pay attention to the signs.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 共享单车提醒：车停错区域时，App 说明这只是提醒，不是吓唬
options.english_template: Your bike is outside the right area. ___.
options.expected_phrase: This note is only a reminder
